inputs.price_source: NYSE MTA approximate close 2026-06-11 (mechanical refresh will sync Stooq)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operating activities $4.408M / 92.510M weighted average shares (exhibit99-2.htm consolidated statements of cash flows)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses IFRS cash from operating activities, not net loss ($4.2M) which includes $6.6M G&A and $2.9M share-based payments. Minimal sustaining capex at royalty holding company.

bear.notes: Commodity price weakness; Endeavor restart delays; development assets slip beyond 2030; G&A stays elevated vs tiny cash flow

base.notes: GEO volume toward management 2029-2031 outlook from producing base plus Tocantinzinho, Wharf, Aranzazu; development royalties (Cote/Gosselin, Copper World, Taca Taca) ramp per operator guidance in corporate presentation

bull.notes: Management >35% six-year GEO CAGR achieved; consensus NAV $7.75 converges; accretive M&A continues at historical discipline

optionality_gate.notes: Consensus NAV per share $7.75 vs ~$6.50 price (~16% discount) per May 2026 factsheet; Lawrence owner-cash path remains stance gate; development book sized in nav_overlay only.

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Royalty interests carried at cost/amortized cost; economic value tied to metal prices and operator reserves, not marked to market (exhibit99-2.htm accounting policies)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 79% of internal NPV in development stage per May 2026 corporate presentation; Cote/Gosselin, Taca Taca, Copper World, Castle Mountain not fully in FY2025 cash flow

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single royalty/stream operating model; operating profit before G&A $0.064M FY2025 (exhibit99-2.htm)

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: GEO outlook 3,436 (2025) to 12,000-23,500 (2029-2031E) per corporate presentation; development royalties start 2026-2030

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investment in Silverback; dividends received $0.316M FY2025 (exhibit99-2.htm cash flows)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No regular dividend since 2020; special dividend C$0.03 in 2023 only (exhibit99-1.htm Dividends section)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Tocantinzinho (1,293 GEOs 2025), Wharf, Aranzazu already in FY2025 revenue $11.7M (exhibit99-3.htm MD&A)

nav_overlay_options.label: Development-stage royalty book (2030 GEO uplift)
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: Consensus NAV $7.75 less producing-cash NAV implied at spot; not in Lawrence FCF starting point
nav_overlay_options.evidence: investor-documents/ir-mta/corporate-presentation.pdf — GEO outlook and NPV by stage

nav_overlay_options.label: Analyst consensus NAV convergence
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: Partial credit for ~16% discount to $7.75 NAVPS at $6.50 price; full NAV not in Lawrence base

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Producing mine ramps (Tocantinzinho ~1,300 GEOs/yr, Wharf, Aranzazu) plus development starts Cote/Gosselin (~2028), Copper World (~2029), Taca Taca (~2030) per May 2026 corporate presentation
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Sustained metal price decline or operator delays on top-five development assets
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Management >35% six-year GEO CAGR delivered with accretive acquisitions below 15% IRR hurdle

catalyst_paths.impact: Incremental GEOs from IAMGOLD super-pit per operator guidance
Management six-year outlook in corporate presentation
Cash flow flat; G&A burden persists; NAV discount widens

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
